body.title: Reorg deferred: move seed_*.py + cc_memory_seed/ archives — needs caller updates first
body.result: Resolved per-bucket (commit 550da87f). Moved 27 truly-orphan seed_*.py files to TheIgorsProject/seed_archive/. Reclassified 38 remaining seed_*.py + cc_memory_seed/ as active runtime assets (not archive): seed_layer3/4 deposit TEMPLATE nodes verified by tests; seed_goal_close_habit read by test; cc_memory_seed read by installer.py:349. Updated reorg-plan doc.
body.description:
Companion to T-reorg-bucket-archive-moves (which shipped the 33 clearly-safe files). The remaining buckets have live referrers that need updating in lockstep with the move:

**Blocked sub-buckets:**
- `lab/claudecode/seed_layer3_*.py` (8 files) + `lab/claudecode/seed_layer4_*.py` (5 files) — imported by tests (test_layer3_*, test_layer4_*) via `from claudecode.seed_layerN_xxx import (...)`. Tests would need import-path updates if files move.
- `lab/claudecode/seed_goal_close_habit.py` — read by `tests/test_goal_close_habit.py:261,268` via `Path(...) / 'lab' / 'claudecode' / 'seed_goal_close_habit.py'`. Test reads file content for schema verification.
- `lab/claudecode/cc_memory_seed/` (46 files) — read by `wild_igor/setup_assets/installer.py:349` for new-box memory seeding. Moving breaks installer.
- Other `lab/claudecode/seed_*.py` (~52 files) — most likely safe but need per-file grep before move.

**Affected files:** lab/claudecode/seed_*.py (~65 total); lab/claudecode/cc_memory_seed/ (46); tests/test_layer3_*.py + tests/test_layer4_*.py + tests/test_goal_close_habit.py (caller updates if moved); wild_igor/setup_assets/installer.py:349 (path update if cc_memory_seed moves).

**Design rules:** archives → TheIgorsProject (rubric default per reorg-plan-2026-05-01-opus-pass.md); ship-clean (don't leave dual paths).

**Scope boundary:** IN — decide per-bucket: (a) move + update callers, (b) move + leave a thin re-export shim, (c) leave in place permanently and re-classify as not-archive. OUT — actually moving without resolving the caller question.

**Test plan:** per-file grep before each move; pytest -x -q after each batch; new-box installer dry-run if cc_memory_seed touched.
